name: ecov002-granules

metadata.name: ECOv002-granules
metadata.summary: ECOSTRESS Collection 2 Data Product Granule Encapsulation Classes

documentation:
# ECOSTRESS Collection 2 Data Product Granule Encapsulation Classes The `ECOv002-granules` Python package includes classes encapsulating the ECOSTRESS Collection 2 tiled data products. [Gregory H. Halverson](https://github.com/gregory-halverson-jpl) (they/them)
[gregory.h.halverson@jpl.nasa.gov](mailto:gregory.h.halverson@jpl.nasa.gov)
NASA Jet Propulsion Laboratory 329G ## Installation ``` pip install ECOv002-granules ```

documentation: This is a minimalistic performance timer.
